trivia_bullets.text: Fervent Champion is a Player Spotlight (World Champion) card commemorating Javier Dominguez, winner of the 2018 Magic World Championship. His name and title appear in the flavor text field: '2018 World Champion Javier Dominguez.' Illustrated by Steve Argyle.

Color, creature type (Human Knight), and aggressive stat line position this card in Embereth, ELD's red court that prizes courage. The Planeswalker's Guide notes Embereth knights famously never carry shields — Fervent Champion's charging solo art reflects that ethos.

Saw significant Standard play in 2019-2020 in knight tribal and equipment-based red aggro. Equip-cost reduction of 3 makes it a functional Embercleave target. Continued into Pioneer and Modern equipment shells.

Community resonance: Dominguez won World Championship 30 in 2024, becoming one of only two players to win the title twice. Wizards referenced the Fervent Champion card directly in post-event coverage.
sources: magic.gg: 'The Week That Was: The Fervent Champion Returns'

related_cards.name: Embercleave
related_cards.note: Irencrag-named legendary equipment; Fervent Champion's equip-cost reduction directly benefits this card

related_cards.name: Worthy Knight
related_cards.note: White Knight with token generation; key partner in Mardu Knights Standard builds

related_cards.name: Rimrock Knight
related_cards.note: Boulder Rush adventure; fellow Embereth-aligned attacker that Fervent Champion pumps on attack
